conservative.name: Bind Undead
conservative.requirements:
5 Power
Target undead creature within medium range

success.description: You bend the target undead creature to your will. Until the next sunrise, it obeys your commands. If the undead creature is a powerful, free-willed being (such as a Vampire or certain Wights), it will very likely resent being controlled in this manner and may seek revenge when the spell wears off...

boon.description: The controlled creature immediately performs one action or manoeuvre

bane.description: Before your control takes hold, the creature may immediately perform one action- probably in an attempt to kill you

sigmarsComet.description: You may affect additional targets with Willpower no higher than the first. The total number of targets affected cannot be higher than the total generated on the roll

reckless.name: Call Undead
reckless.requirements:
6 Power
You hold aloft a quantity of fresh human blood or flesh and chant as you cast this spell; you must continue to do so until the creatures appear

success.description: Your dark magics irresistibility call undead creatures to your location. A number of undead creatures up to your character rank within a dozen miles coverage on your position, intrigued by your offering of blood or flesh

boon.description: Remove 1 recharge token from this card and adjust your stance 1 space towards Conservative
Remove 1 recharge token from this card and adjust your stance 1 space towards Conservative
